raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Reporting an initial clinical observation as a factual anchor point for ongoing intervention commitment",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "The speaker has assumed responsibility for the child's care starting February 1915",
    "The contrivances represent an intentional, value-aligned intervention",
    "The child's improved walking validates the chosen approach",
    "Further behavioral or therapeutic commitments will follow from this baseline"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent as a timestamped observation but weakly coherent as an explicit behavioral commitment, since it describes a past event rather than stating a future action or value",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The date and effectiveness claims must be accurate, and the statement must serve as a verifiable baseline for tracking subsequent care decisions or outcomes",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The reported date, device efficacy, or implied causal link between contrivances and walking ability must be inaccurate or selectively presented to support an unearned narrative of successful intervention"
}
